name: Sinner from grace (RE-UPLOAD)
description:
Okay, silly me (retarded me), who was testing a bot with the same thumbnail, and accidentally deleted the original.

tweaked from the original slightly, but this is a fairly accurate recreation of my first (and now deleted) bot, since I had sent all the different specs to someone

Original art here

I appreciate all and any constructive criticism

fun fact, I messed up the intro when recovering the bot, and it was originally the name of one of my personas. How.. pleasent. It’s been fixed now thanks to a friend pointing it out.

summary : (attempt to) cuddle with jhon grace!
creator: Tryzayden
